payload.title: Resolve the active board from session claims; stop trusting X-Scope-Workspace in cloud
payload.description: SCP-171 remainder. In cloud mode derive the active project/board from the authenticated session (claims plus a selected-project header that is validated against the users membership), never from an unauthenticated client-supplied X-Scope-Workspace header. A request can only resolve to a board the subject is a member of.
